rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding outputs to inputs via implementation-level ports or subcomponent connections.
Preserve AADL structure by ensuring annexes are attached only to valid component or implementation scopes with visible feature access.
generic_rules: Place contracts in implementation scope when they depend on internal subcomponent bindings.
Only use visible features (ports, outputs) in contracts—never internal paths or subcomponent references.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE blocks.
Relate visible outputs directly to visible inputs using boolean expressions, not AADL properties.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE annexes.
Do not embed subcomponent port paths in component type annexes.
